creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Sat Nov  2 17:34:59 2013
New Revision: 332523
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332523

Log:
  - Update to version 10
  - Support staging
  
  PR:		ports/181888
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/science/bodr/Makefile
  head/science/bodr/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/science/bodr/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/science/bodr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/science/bodr/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 17:34:44 2013	(r332522)
+++ head/science/bodr/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 17:34:59 2013	(r332523)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	bodr
-PORTVERSION=	9
+PORTVERSION=	10
 CATEGORIES=	science
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -11,14 +11,16 @@ COMMENT=	Chemistry data like element and
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	xsltproc:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libxslt
 
-USES=		perl5
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
+USES=		gmake perl5
 USE_PERL5=	build
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ENV=	PERL="${PERL}"
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|{datadir}/pkgconfig|{prefix}/libdata/pkgconfig|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		'/pkgconfig/s|{datadir}|{prefix}/libdata|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/science/bodr/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/science/bodr/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 17:34:44 2013	(r332522)
+++ head/science/bodr/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 17:34:59 2013	(r332523)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (bodr-9.tar.bz2) = a7ed30ecc385ff9fe9b2af84710574ac12febea081b5123db6d6337a4a7a4b60
-SIZE (bodr-9.tar.bz2) = 210548
+SHA256 (bodr-10.tar.bz2) = 738a0f0e263cdc088581d0a67a0ea16ec586ceb424704d0ff73bdb5da5d4ee81
+SIZE (bodr-10.tar.bz2) = 225671

-share/doc/bodr/AUTHORS

-share/bodr/crystalstructures.xml
-share/bodr/elements.xml
-share/bodr/isotopes.xml
-share/bodr/space-groups.xml
 libdata/pkgconfig/bodr.pc
-@dirrm share/bodr/dicts
-@dirrm share/bodr
-@dirrm share/doc/bodr/biblio
-@dirrm share/doc/bodr
+%%DATADIR%%/crystalstructures.xml
+%%DATADIR%%/dicts/blueobelisk-dictionary.xml
+%%DATADIR%%/elements.xml
+%%DATADIR%%/isotopes.xml
+%%DATADIR%%/space-groups.xml

+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/biblio/space-groups_biblio.html

+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/dicts
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
